summary: package eu.kalafatic.utils.windows; import java.io.BufferedReader; import java.io.IOException; import java.io.InputStreamReader; public class WinCMDUtils { private volatile static WinCMDUtils INSTANCE; public static WinCMDUtils getInstance() { if (INSTANCE == null) { synchronized (WinCMDUtils.class) { INSTANCE = new WinCMDUtils(); } } return INSTANCE; }
